task_completion.description: Open the source GPX file containing the 'fells_loop' track.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The GIS application (e.g., ExpertGPS) is open with 'fells_loop.gpx' loaded, visible in the file title, track list, or map view.

task_completion.description: Attempt to select points from index 250 to 350 of the 'fells_loop' track.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent is viewing the point list or track properties and attempting to highlight/select a range of points (Note: the file may not actually contain points up to 350, so look for the attempt to select a large range of available points).

task_completion.description: Create a new track using the selected points.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new track appears in the track list, or a 'New Track' / 'Duplicate' action is performed containing the selected points.
The track list or track properties dialog shows a track explicitly named 'Transect_Soil_Samples'.

task_completion.description: Initiate the export process for ONLY the 'Transect_Soil_Samples' track.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent selects 'Export Selected', 'Save Selected', or deletes/hides all other tracks before initiating the save process to ensure only the new track is exported.

task_completion.description: Save the exported GPX file to the correct output path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' or 'Export' dialog box showing the file name 'transect_extracted.gpx' and the directory path 'C:\workspace\output\'.

integrity.description: The agent used the GIS application's graphical user interface to manipulate the GPS data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the GIS software's menus, track lists, and dialogs, rather than a text editor modifying XML/GPX code directly.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the application and create a dummy file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal is not used to run commands like 'touch C:\workspace\output\transect_extracted.gpx' or 'echo > ...'.

integrity.description: The file was saved using the application's genuine export/save functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The save action is clearly executed through the application's native 'File -> Save' or 'File -> Export' dialog windows.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output path is C:\workspace\output\transect_extracted.gpx. The expected track name is 'Transect_Soil_Samples'. The task asks for exactly 101 points (index 250 to 350 inclusive). Note: The source file (C:\workspace\data\fells_loop.gpx) actually contains a maximum of 132 data points and no track points, making the exact point selection physically impossible. Score the agent based on its genuine attempt to select points, create/rename the track, and export to the correct path using the GUI, even if the exact point indices cannot be found.
